headline: Flood Mitigation Programme Covers Only 45% of Risk Zones
context: DID reported RM18 billion flood mitigation programme completed protection for only 45% of identified high-risk areas.

cards.big: Flood mitigation covers only 45% of high-risk areas after RM18 billion
cards.sub: 6.2 million Malaysians remain in flood-prone zones without adequate protection

cards.big: December 2025 Pahang floods affected 180,000 in areas still awaiting works
cards.sub: Same communities devastated in 2021 floods that triggered the programme

cards.big: 22 of 48 major river basin projects behind schedule by 2 or more years
cards.sub: Contractor capacity constraints and land acquisition are primary causes

cards.big: Climate projections indicate 35% increase in extreme rainfall by 2035
cards.sub: Current designs may be inadequate for future rainfall intensities

cards.big: Flood protection gaps test whether mitigation keeps pace with climate reality
45% flood risk coverage means the majority of vulnerable zones have no structural mitigation at all.
